expected.title: File system | Node.js v25.9.0 Documentation
must_not_contain: About this documentation Usage and example Assertion testing
Deprecated APIs Diagnostics Channel DNS Domain

notes: Node.js docs wrap the api content area with role="main" (on <div id="apicontent">), so the selector chain matches on [role="main"] after the main → article → [role="main"] cascade. The navigation sidebar lives in <div role="navigation" id="column2"> which stripChrome removes before extraction. The original curation mistakenly assumed no semantic selector would match because a naive exact-quote grep missed the role attribute — the real HTML has role="main" and the strategy is correctly `selector`, not `heuristic`.
